comments.author: codex
comments.body: Added the Go-native workflow journal and acceptance gate contract in bigclaw-go/internal/workflow so the runtime slice now has a typed WorkpadJournal, acceptance decision model, execution outcome contract, and evidence-driven approval logic migrated from src/bigclaw/workflow.py with direct package tests for journal persistence, approval requirements, incomplete evidence rejection, accepted closeout, and hold-path rejection. Validation: cd bigclaw-go && go test ./internal/workflow -> ok; cd bigclaw-go && go test ./... -> ok; bash scripts/ops/bigclawctl github-sync status --json -> local SHA dc44588f83d7eaa5135489ec649799b77f860402 matches remote SHA dc44588f83d7eaa5135489ec649799b77f860402 with status ok and synced true; git log -1 --stat -> captured for commit dc44588f83d7eaa5135489ec649799b77f860402 with workflow engine files in the stat output. comments.author: codex
comments.body: Wired scheduler assessment output into the Go worker runtime so `RunOnce` now consumes `Scheduler.Assess(...)`, emits orchestration/risk/policy details on `scheduler.routed`, and publishes `run.takeover` handoff events for both blocked reroutes and accepted-but-human-required plans. Added worker runtime coverage for routed assessment payloads and rejected-decision handoff ordering. Validation: `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./internal/worker` -> ok; `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./...` -> ok; `bash scripts/ops/bigclawctl github-sync status --json` -> local SHA `0a556cae73da9b0ee105e0aad10166bc2e3a3bc1` matches remote SHA `0a556cae73da9b0ee105e0aad10166bc2e3a3bc1` with `status: ok` and `synced: true`; `git log -1 --stat` -> captured for commit `0a556cae73da9b0ee105e0aad10166bc2e3a3bc1` with worker runtime files in the stat output. comments.author: codex
comments.body: Extended the Go worker runtime to emit per-attempt workpad journals under an optional runtime `WorkpadDir`, record intake/scheduler/handoff/execution transitions into `workflow.WorkpadJournal`, and persist the resulting path into task metadata so existing `/v2/runs/{id}` artifacts can surface the workpad without additional API changes. Added worker coverage proving the journal file is written and attached to the stored task snapshot. Validation: `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./internal/worker` -> ok; `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./...` -> ok; `bash scripts/ops/bigclawctl github-sync status --json` -> local SHA `781f23336090194d385788350dc0aa945ecbf1bb` matches remote SHA `781f23336090194d385788350dc0aa945ecbf1bb` with `status: ok` and `synced: true`; `git log -1 --stat` -> captured for commit `781f23336090194d385788350dc0aa945ecbf1bb` with worker runtime files in the stat output. comments.author: codex
comments.body: Finished the Go workflow closeout wiring in the worker runtime so successful runs now evaluate `workflow.AcceptanceGate` from task metadata evidence, persist acceptance and approval status back onto the task snapshot, record acceptance details in the workpad journal, and emit a `run.annotated` acceptance event for downstream reporting and triage surfaces. Validation: `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./internal/worker` -> ok; `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./...` -> ok; `bash scripts/ops/bigclawctl github-sync status --json` -> local SHA `ced2b37bfb430e07f87f2f945373e0ee87320e34` matches remote SHA `ced2b37bfb430e07f87f2f945373e0ee87320e34` with `status: ok` and `synced: true`; `git log -1 --stat` -> captured for commit `ced2b37bfb430e07f87f2f945373e0ee87320e34` with worker runtime acceptance files in the stat output.
